title: ResearchBundle
description: Web-research evidence produced by career-research for a job, consumed by analysis_service to generate a research-augmented Job Report. The agent produces evidence only; it never writes the final report or MetadataStore.

job_id.description: Job this research bundle was produced for.

research_inputs_hash.description: Hash of the inputs that produced this bundle (job_id + jd_hash + planner version). Cache/freshness key.

bundle_hash.description: Content hash of the validated research bundle. Folded into the Job Report cache key so a new bundle invalidates a stale JD-only report.

used_research.description: Whether the downstream report actually used this research (false when validation failed and the report fell back to JD-only).

verified_source_count.description: Sources whose URL matched a real web_fetch (ground truth).

source_type.description: company_website | press_release | job_board | news | linkedin | other

run_log_path.description: Path to the agent run log used as fabrication ground-truth.
